stem: The text describes how data is sent across a network.
review_notes: Shuffle-test fixture for cloze_with_bank. The bank is authored alphabetically — if the displayed bank stays alphabetical the shuffle is NOT applied. Not every word is used.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Complete the description with words from the bank. Not every word is used.

part_config.text: A packet sent across the internet has a header containing the {{src}} address of the sender and the {{dst}} address of the recipient. Splitting a larger message into smaller packets that travel independently across the network is called {{ps}}. The protocol that assigns these addresses and routes the packets is {{prot}}.
